Hello and welcome to gym launch. Hi, Brad. Super excited to have you. I promise you are in good hands, so I appreciate you trusting us. This is all we do, so I'm very excited to have you. That being said, my primary goal is to get you to the promised line as fast as humanly possible. And so you'll notice that the style that we make our videos is we try and go as short and to the point as humanly possible. In the next couple of videos, you'll find things that you need to consume within your first week or so so that you can get things going. Now, depending on who you spoke with, it may be a priority for you to ASAP, transition your existing facility without even running cold traffic. If that is the case, then you are going to let your implementation coach know that that is what you want to do first, and then they will lead you through the promotions that you need to run internally, the text blasts, the emails, and the offers that you're going to give to your internal customers to convert them as fast as possible. Now, if that is not you and you are coming in normally to either begin a hybrid model, as in you have, let's say, a personal training business, and you have 15 clients, and you have a place that you can train and meet people, then you'd be starting from scratch, and so you would be following everything as normal. The other option is if you have an existing facility and you'd prefer to prove to yourself that you can sell people first into this new offer before transitioning your facility, which I also understand from an emotional standpoint, and so that is how this is structured. When we ran our beta test, that's exactly what we did. We had to prove to them first that they were going to be able to acquire customers in spades very profitably using the hybrid system. And then once they saw the math favors, the more you change in the direction of hybrid, the more favorable the return is, but the more beliefs you have to break, and the more fears you'll have to overcome, mostly irrational. And so to help you conquer that, we have included the video hybrid explanation which should help you conquer some of those fears. Obviously, you should have seen plaintiff testimonials before coming into this training to help lay some of those fears as well. That being said, the remainder of the overview is to help you really understand what it is at a deeper level and to break the beliefs and transfer the conviction that I have to you. And I want to explain very clearly once and for all. The reason this works is not because it's some trick or some hack, right? The reason that it works is because it's a superior value proposition, meaning customers who get one-on-one attention are going to succeed more and receive more value than group workout clients do. And so you need to see this as I'm giving massively discounted personal training rather than I'm trying to get people to give me money and no longer work out at my facility. And so that's where you need to break this because many of you or many people watching this want to break the chain of trading time for dollars. The only way to do that is to break the chain of trading time for dollars. And so you need to get out of, you need to understand what we're selling as the result that someone is going to have and the likelihood that they're going to achieve it. Now, hopefully if you're here, you agree that nutrition and accountability for general population is going to be 90% plus of the battle that they're going to need to face in order for them to get long-term, I'm not talking six months, but I'm talking six years, 25 years results, is that you're going to need to work with them to help them change their habits and find sustainable interventions that they can actually do on a regular basis. And so for Gen Pop Susie, that may just be walking outside 10 minutes a day. And you have to be okay with that because that's what she needs. Not what we need as coaches to feel like we're doing our daily undulating periodization and we have these huge plans out, but what they need for their goals at this moment in their life. And so the reason this works is because people prefer things that are on demand and customized to them and that is exactly what this is. And so that is why you will notice that you will sell more people at a higher price point. And the fact that it costs you less to fulfill is irrelevant to how much we are selling this for. And that is why there exists a huge opportunity because in the marketplace right now, people can look and compare their gyms. It's very difficult to compare other online coaches because it's not nearly as visible, which allows you to have more of a price of a serpency and ultimately make a better margin. Okay, so understanding all of this within the scope of how we do things, I want to welcome you to the training, follow the Yellowbrick Road, listen to your implementation coach because they do this all day long, get people off the ground as fast as possible and get you out of your own way so that you can succeed. That being said, some of the next videos will dive more into each of the five core functions and how we structure the trainings and how we structure every training. And then some more deep dives into the offer stack, the offers that we're gonna be giving to internal external customers. And then also the five different scenarios that you can ultimately transition your gym to when you make that decision after you've acquired some customers from cold traffic. So thank you so much for trusting us. I promise you are in good hands and I look forward to seeing you on the other side.
